remarks: Originally designed with the hallmarks of mid-century modern architecture - open living spaces, soaring ceilings, abundant natural light, and a connection to the outdoors - this Village Creek waterfront home has been thoughtfully renovated for contemporary living while preserving the spirit of its original design. Master Bedroom en suite includes two home offices, W/D and steam shower in master bath. Private wrap-around deck.   Three additional bedrooms and three bathrooms. Hot tub. HOA dues $1,200/ year includes access to private beach, tennis courts, dog park, playground and more. Garden shed with electric and water. In-law or au pair accommodations on the lower level with private entrance (legal ADU).  Deep water private slip and small boat rack. Current homeowner/ seller has professionally designed both the home and the gardens and maintained them both for over 40 years. Full mature plantings with privacy.
